Container.Name: taco-bell-optimizer
Container.Overview: Taco Bell Order Optimizer - pick the food you want and find the cheapest combination of boxes, combos, and swaps to get it at nearby Taco Bells. Stateless; prices are fetched live from tacobell.com and cached in memory. No volumes or environment variables required.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web interface
